steps.title: Match the plural antecedent
steps.content: The blank refers back to Dickinson's poems. The phrase "these works" also confirms that the pronoun must refer to multiple items, not a single thing.

steps.title: Reject singular pronouns
steps.content: B, C, and D are singular pronouns, so they do not agree with the plural antecedent "poems." The sentence needs a plural object pronoun after "of." The answer is A.
